{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40476", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-407", "name": "Inefficient Algorithmic Complexity"}], "description": "The `OverlappingFieldsCanBeMerged` validation rule exhibits quadratic time complexity when processing queries with many repeated fields sharing the same response name. An attacker can send a crafted query like `{ hello hello hello ... }` with thousands of repeated fields, causing excessive CPU usage during validation before execution begins.

This is not mitigated by existing QueryDepth or QueryComplexity rules.

**Observed impact (tested on v15.31.4):**
- 1000 fields: ~0.6s
- 2000 fields: ~2.4s
- 3000 fields: ~5.3s
- 5000 fields: request timeout (>20s)

**Root cause:** `collectConflictsWithin()` performs O(n²) pairwise comparisons of all fields with the same response name. For identical repeated fields, every comparison returns "no conflict" but the quadratic iteration count causes resource exhaustion.

**Fix:** Deduplicate structurally identical fields before pairwise comparison, reducing the complexity from O(n²) to O(u²) where u is the number of unique field signatures (typically 1 for this attack pattern).

**Credit:** Ashwak N (ashwakn04@gmail.com)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00485, "percentile": 0.38535}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-68jq-c3rv-pcrr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-14T01:05:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-68jq-c3rv-pcrr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-68jq-c3rv-pcrr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40476"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-17T22:16:33Z", "published_at": "2026-04-14T01:05:05Z", "references": ["https://github.com/webonyx/graphql-php/security/advisories/GHSA-68jq-c3rv-pcrr", "https://github.com/webonyx/graphql-php/releases/tag/v15.31.5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40476", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-68jq-c3rv-pcrr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/webonyx/graphql-php/security-advisories/GHSA-68jq-c3rv-pcrr", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/webonyx/graphql-php", "summary": "graphql-php is affected by a Denial of Service via quadratic complexity in OverlappingFieldsCanBeMerged validation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:09:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-68jq-c3rv-pcrr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "15.31.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "webonyx/graphql-php"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 15.31.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: graphql-php is affected by a Denial of Service via quadratic complexity in OverlappingFieldsCanBeMerged validation
